name: chronogrove
description: Chronogrove — Firebase-hosted API and operator console for provider-backed widgets (Discogs, Steam, Instagram, etc.)

scripts.build: NEXT_PUBLIC_GIT_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) turbo run build
scripts.dev: NEXT_PUBLIC_GIT_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) turbo run dev
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -n emulators,next -c blue,green "firebase emulators:start" "pnpm run dev"
scripts.dev:full:fresh: pnpm run build && pnpm run dev:full
scripts.deploy:all: node scripts/guard-functions-env.cjs && pnpm run build && firebase deploy
scripts.deploy:hosting: pnpm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting
